column2: Description
When enabled,  the system calculates total seat capacity by summing floor capacities; when disabled, seat capacity can be manually defined
Defines whitelisted IP addresses or IP ranges for office check-in restrictions.
Enables the temperature scan feature.
Controls whether the Property Management System (PMS) integration is enabled.
Controls whether parking checkout is automatically performed along with office checkout.
Controls whether office check-in is automatically completed along with parking check-in.
Controls the URL of the footer image displayed on generated QR codes.
Controls the URL of the client logo displayed on generated QR codes.
Defines the types of bookings eligible for check-in.
Defines the set of data columns displayed in forecasting reports.
Defines the minimum time interval required between consecutive scans.
Defines the minimum temperature threshold allowed for entry validation.
Defines the maximum temperature threshold allowed for entry validation.
Defines the cutoff time for guard application actions such as entry validation.
Defines configured time intervals used for calculating seat utilization and booking metrics.
Defines the configured time at which SMS notifications are triggered.
Defines the environment to which the site is mapped.
Controls the group type configuration for hierarchy setup on the floor plan.
Defines the group types used for hierarchy setup.
Sends email notifications to configured stakeholders when an employee's temperature meets or exceeds the maximum threshold during guard app check-in.
Defines the seat sanitization cutoff time in minutes.
Automatically switches to the next DigiPass scan mode after the first scan is completed.
Enables or disables QR code scanning for seat sanitization.
Enables carbon footprint tracking for employee commutes and displays emissions metrics.
